description: Node Doctor IPv6 / Dual-Stack Health - IPv6 monitor conditions (sysctl, default route, link-local/global addresses, router advertisements, firewall blackhole), IPv6 peer connectivity and latency, IPv6 gateway latency, and AAAA DNS resolution. Requires the IPv6 network monitors to be enabled.

panels.title: Sysctl Misconfigured
panels.description: Number of nodes currently reporting the IPv6SysctlMisconfigured condition (active = problem)

panels.title: Default Route Missing
panels.description: Number of nodes currently reporting the IPv6DefaultRouteMissing condition (active = problem)

panels.title: Link-Local Missing
panels.description: Number of nodes currently reporting the IPv6LinkLocalMissing condition (active = problem)

panels.title: Global Address Missing
panels.description: Number of nodes currently reporting the IPv6GlobalAddressMissing condition (active = problem)

panels.title: RA Disabled
panels.description: Number of nodes currently reporting the IPv6RouterAdvertisementDisabled condition (active = problem)

panels.title: Firewall Blackhole
panels.description: Number of nodes currently reporting the IPv6FirewallBlackhole condition (active = problem)
All currently-active IPv6 conditions (condition_status == 1) broken down by node and condition type.
panels.title: Active IPv6 Conditions by Node
Active IPv6 Conditions Over Time
panels.description: Count of nodes with each IPv6 condition active over time.

panels.title: IPv6 Condition Transitions (rate/min)
panels.description: Rate of IPv6 condition True transitions per minute.

panels.title: IPv6 Avg Peer Latency
panels.description: Average latency across all IPv6 peer connections.

panels.title: IPv6 Max Peer Latency
panels.description: Maximum IPv6 peer latency observed.

panels.title: IPv6 Peer Reachability %
panels.description: Percentage of IPv6 peer connections currently reachable.

panels.title: IPv6 Gateway Avg Latency
panels.description: Average latency to the IPv6 default gateway.

panels.title: AAAA DNS Avg Latency
panels.description: Average DNS resolution latency for AAAA (IPv6) records.

panels.title: IPv6 Unreachable Peers
panels.description: Number of IPv6 peer connections currently unreachable.

panels.title: Peer Latency: IPv4 vs IPv6
panels.description: Average peer latency by address family for selected families.

panels.title: IPv6 Peer Latency by Node
panels.description: IPv6 peer latency over time grouped by source node.

panels.title: DNS Latency: A vs AAAA
panels.description: DNS resolution latency comparing A (IPv4) vs AAAA (IPv6) record types.

panels.title: IPv6 Peer Reachability by Node
panels.description: IPv6 peer reachability over time grouped by source node (1 = reachable).
Per-connection IPv6 peer latency and reachability matrix.
panels.title: IPv6 Node-to-Peer Matrix
ipv6-sysctl-check
panels.description: Number of nodes running the ipv6-sysctl-check monitor.

panels.title: ipv6-route-check
panels.description: Number of nodes running the ipv6-route-check monitor.

panels.title: ipv6-neighbor-check
panels.description: Number of nodes running the ipv6-neighbor-check monitor.

panels.title: ipv6-firewall-check
panels.description: Number of nodes running the ipv6-firewall-check monitor.

panels.title: IPv6 Monitor Events Rate (per minute)
panels.description: Event rate from IPv6 monitors (sysctl/route/neighbor/firewall).

title: Node Doctor - IPv6 / Dual-Stack Health
